titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 18: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 18. (A.R. No. 231 of 1926.) KĪḺAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAIYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the central shrine in the Vaṭamūlēśvara temple.

Records that Nakkaṉ Sāttaṉ, a military official ? (paḍaippēraraiyaṉ) of Paradūr made a gift of ninety sheep for burning a perpetual lamp with an uḻakku of oil daily, to the God Tiruvālanduṟai-Mahādēvar at Śiṟupaḻuvūr in Kuṉṟak-kūṟṟam to propitiate god to secure victory for Kaṇḍaṉ Amudaṉār, the Paḻuvēṭṭaraiyar, in the battle at Veḷḷūr, where the Pāṇḍya king brought the army of Īḻam and fought against the king (Perumāṉaḍigaḷ ie Parāntaka).
He made another gift of ten sheep for providing five nāḷi of ghee (to conduct offerings) on the occasion of Ayaṉasaṅkarānthi.
He further made a gift of 24 sheep for supplying two nāḻi of ghee (to provide for the bath) every month on the occasion of puṇarpūśam, the natal star of the above Paḻuvēṭṭaraiyar chief.
The donor further made two gift of four sheep one for anointment of god and the other for the burning of a lamp on the day of Kārttigai in the Kārttigai month.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
maturai ko
ṇṭa koppara
kecaripanmaṟ
ku yāṇṭu
10 2 Āvatu Iv
vāṇṭu perumāṉaṭikaḷoṭu pā
ṇṭiyaṉār Īḻap paṭai kuṇantu ve
ḷur Astikaṭaiceyta nāṉṟu paḻu
veṭṭaraiyar kaṇṭaṉ Amutaṉār viraśrī
Uṇṭāvateṉṟu poykai kuṟuviṭat
tu paratūruṭaiyāṉ paṭaipperarayaṉ nakkaṉ cā
ttaṉ kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu ciṟupaḻuvūrt tiruvālantu
ṟai mahādevarku candrādityaval I
ravum pakalum Oru tiru(v)viḷakku Eriya nicatap
paṭi nārāyattāl Uḻakku neykku vaitta cāvāmuvā
p perāṭu 9 10m Ayaṉasaṅkirāntikaḷ ṭoṟum Āṭiya
ruḷa ney Aññāḻikku vaitta Āṭu 10m paḻuve
ṭṭaraiyar kaṇṭaṉ Amutaṉār tirunakṣattirikai
puṇarpūcatti nāṉṟu tiṅkaḷṭoṟum
Iru nāḻi ney Āṭiyaruḷa vetta Āṭu 2 10 4 kā
ttikai kāttikai nāḷaṉṟu Āṭi Aruḷa ney nāḻik
ku vaitta Āṭu 4m kāttikai viḷakku Eriya vait
ta ney �kku vaitta Āṭu Añcu Itu
panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 18 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
